findings.text: The extraction includes the tenancy start date (13 March 2026) and end date (25 August 2026).
The extraction includes the total rent amount (£4,686.18) and advance rent payment (£500).
The extraction includes the arrears clause allowing notice to quit after two monthly instalments in arrears.
The extraction includes the cooling-off period clause (7 days after electronic signature or 4 hours after key collection).

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Verification Note: NAP-SRC-0010 Extraction Completeness

## Summary
- The provided extraction excerpt covers key clauses: tenancy dates, rent, arrears/notice to quit, and cooling-off period.
- The excerpt is truncated; full extraction is needed to verify completeness of termination, liability, guarantor, and other clauses.
- OCR quality appears moderate with minor errors (e.g., 'Edinbugh').

## Present Clauses
- Tenancy start/end dates
- Rent amount and advance payment
- Arrears and notice to quit (Clause 2(b))
- Cooling-off period (Clause 2(d))

## Missing/Uncertain Clauses
- Full Clause 2(e) (liability after non-move-in or early move-out)
- Guarantor provisions
- Code of Conduct annex
- Inventory of contents
- Termination procedures beyond notice to quit

## Recommendation
Obtain full extraction of NAP-SRC-0010 to ensure all clauses are captured for legal review.
proposed_artifacts.title: NAP-SRC-0010 Extraction Completeness Verification

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-extract NAP-SRC-0010 using a method that captures the entire document text, or retrieve the full extracted text if already available. Verify against the source PDF to ensure no clauses are omitted.

risk_flags.text: Truncated excerpt may omit critical clauses on termination, liability, and guarantor obligations, affecting legal analysis.

summary: Verified NAP-SRC-0010 extraction completeness. Found 4 key clauses present, 3 uncertainties due to truncated excerpt, and 1 risk regarding missing termination/arrears details. Proposed follow-up task to obtain full extraction.

uncertainties.text: The extraction excerpt is truncated; clauses after the cooling-off period (e.g., termination, liability after move-out, guarantor details) are not visible.
The extraction may contain OCR errors (e.g., 'Edinbugh' instead of 'Edinburgh'); full text quality is uncertain.
The extraction does not show the Code of Conduct annex or inventory of contents, which are referenced in the agreement.
